name: Around The Sound Trnsprtn
carrier_operation: Intrastate Only (Non-HM); Private(Property) per MCS-150 (note: BBB/D&B describes business as non-emergency medical/passenger transport)
officers: Steven E Hutchins (President, per UTC/SAM filings)
registry_source: WA Secretary of State / BBB / UTC (Washington Utilities and Transportation Commission company #39752); legal name ATS Trans LLC dba Around the Sound / TransPro
notes: FMCSA snapshot legal name 'ATSTRANSLLC' (DBA ATS Trans LLC) matches Tacoma, WA address — same operating company as 'Around the Sound/TransPro' (per BBB, federal contracting records and CBCA decision). Input address (5304 Point Fosdick Dr, Gig Harbor) is a satellite/secondary office; primary HQ is 4023 S Orchard St / 2220 S Tacoma Way, Tacoma. FMCSA classifies as Private Property which appears inconsistent with the passenger NEMT operation reported elsewhere (per opennpi, Yelp, BBB, retirement directories — 80+ vehicle fleet for NEMT/passenger transport); FMCSA power units (60) reflect MCS-150 self-report. Company founded 1998 per company website but ATS Trans LLC entity registered 2007 per BBB file (predecessor TransPro Inc started 1996 per SAM). ATS replaced TransPro via corporate merger.

name: Care Trans
registry_source: California Secretary of State (bizfile) — entity 'Care Trans Inc' (file no. 6407904) referenced in third-party aggregator (b2bhint) but full record not retrievable (403/CAPTCHA); could not confirm match to 769 E Brokaw Rd, San Jose
notes: No SAFER/FMCSA record found under 'Care Trans' or 'Care Transportation' matching San Jose / 769 E Brokaw Rd. A California entity 'Care Trans Inc' with file number 6407904 exists per OpenCorporates/B2BHint indexes, but those sources blocked retrieval and city/address could not be verified. Multiple unrelated 'Care Trans' / 'Care Transportation' carriers in CA but none at San Jose / Brokaw address. The Brokaw Road address houses many small office tenants — this may be a small NEMT operator without active interstate USDOT registration, or operating intrastate-only under CA PUC (CHP/TCP) jurisdiction rather than FMCSA. Confidence is low and a direct CA SOS bizfile lookup is recommended.

name: Dependable Medical Transport
entity_status: active (per BBB, in business 22+ years; AZ Corporation Commission record not directly retrieved)
registry_source: BBB business profile / Bizapedia (entity 'Dependable Medical Transport Services, L.L.C.' — Arizona LLC); year founded 2003-07-08 per BBB
notes: No SAFER/FMCSA match for 'Dependable Medical Transport' / 'Dependable Medical' / 'Dependable Med' — company likely operates intrastate only under AHCCCS NEMT contracts and does not require USDOT registration (AZ does not mandate USDOT for purely intrastate NEMT under 8-passenger threshold; only AZ DOT MVD authority). BBB profile lists physical address as 2237 N 36th St, Phoenix, AZ 85008 — different from input mailing address (5342 W Camelback Rd #500, Glendale/Phoenix 85031), but Glendale address is also referenced in other directories (alladdress.us). Founded 2003-07-08 per BBB; Arizona Corporation Commission filing not directly retrieved — direct azcc.gov eCorp search recommended for entity ID and members.
